series_description: Material originated by this office that pertains to records retention. This includes but may not be limited to record analysis work sheets, records schedules, documents and material created to assist in records inventory process.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superceded and ; Electronic: Retain until superceded and

series_description: Architectural and Landscape Architectural Firms that have not renewed their registrations.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years from non-renewal and destroy at end of fiscal year (FY) ; Electronic: Purge inactive records at the end of each fiscal year.

series_description: Internal correspondence (letters, memos) and correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information on the board and/or legal interpretations and/or other miscellaneous inquiries.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Folders containing information on Ohio''s registered professionals (i.e., architects, landscape architects) that have died.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years and transfer to Ohio Historical Society (OHS)

series_description: Voided applications for registration (e.g., architect, landscape architect, certificate of authorization)
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years and destroy at end of FY.

series_description: Complaints and all related investigation documents involving architects, landscape architects, and / or firms. May include preliminary investigative documents. Does not include official Board actions such as final Orders.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 5 years after end of investigation and closing of matter ; Electronic: Retain in office 5 years after end of investigation and closing of matter

series_description: Publications produced by the board detailing operations, regulations, and/or procedures. This includes unpublished policy studies and related material/information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced; ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced;
